properties.body:
WESTERN SOUTH ATLANTIC.
URUGUAY.
1. SEISMIC SURVEY IN PROGRESS UNTIL 31 AUG BY
   M/V RAMFORM VANGUARD TOWING 12 7000 METER
   LONG CABLES ALONG TRACKLINE JOINING
   34-59.40S 051-29.37W, 34-29.17S 052-16.43W,
   34-31.08S 052-15.37W, 35-01.33S 051-28.28W,
   34-59.65S 051-29.63W, 34-29.40S 052-16.68W.
   NINE MILE BERTH REQUESTED.
2. CANCEL HYDROLANT 2101/13.
3. CANCEL THIS MSG 01 SEP 13.
